package rulefixtures

// scenario for unbuffered_channel_for_known_producer_count: unbuffered channels `make(chan T)` when the number of producers/messages is known at construction time
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule690PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario690Positive(records []Rule690PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
